overview_zh: 本期从 181 个结构化来源中生成，候选 144 条，跨期排除历史已展示 80 条，入选 18 条。所有条目均保留原始来源链接；若真实抓取不足，则仅发布未展示过的来源索引记录，不用测试数据冒充更新。
overview_en: This brief is generated from 181 structured sources with 144 candidates, 80 previously displayed items excluded, and 18 selected items. Every item keeps an original source link; if live fetching is insufficient, the site publishes only not-yet-shown source-index records instead of fake news.

items.title: 🧠 Community Wisdom: How AI is changing product operating models, tracking work stress with Whoop, whether you need a portfolio of AI side projects, marketing for tiny teams, and more
[AINews] Fable and Mythos officially too dangerous to release
items.summary_zh: 重点：We are in the strangest timeline.
items.summary_en: Focus: We are in the strangest timeline.

items.title: Shopping with Claude: How to find quality brands, automate returns, and buy things that last 100 years | Nicole Ruiz
items.summary_zh: 重点：Lenny's Podcast相关访谈/播客更新，核心议题是“Shopping with Claude: How to find quality brands, automate returns, and buy things that last 100 years | Nicole Ruiz”，可用于跟踪 AI 高管判断、产业方向和产品趋势。
items.summary_en: Focus: Lenny's Podcast is covered in a new interview or podcast. The core topic is 'Shopping with Claude: How to find quality brands, automate returns, and buy things that last 100 years | Nicole Ruiz', useful for tracking executive views, AI strategy and product direction.

items.title: #497 – Biggest Mysteries in Physics: Antimatter, Dark Energy & ToE – Don Lincoln
items.summary_zh: 重点：Don Lincoln is a particle physicist at Fermilab who has spent decades working at the frontiers of high energy physics. Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep497-sc See below for timestamps, and to give feedback,
items.summary_en: Focus: Don Lincoln is a particle physicist at Fermilab who has spent decades working at the frontiers of high energy physics. Thank you for listening ❤ Check out our sponsors: https://lexfridman.com/sponsors/ep497-sc See below for timestamps, and to give feedback, submit questions, contact Lex, etc.

items.title: Reiner Pope – Chip design from the bottom up
items.summary_zh: 重点：Working up from basic logic gates to why GPUs, TPUs, FPGAs, and the human brain each look the way they do.
items.summary_en: Focus: Working up from basic logic gates to why GPUs, TPUs, FPGAs, and the human brain each look the way they do.

items.title: Eric Jang – Building AlphaGo from scratch
items.summary_zh: 重点：AlphaGo is still the cleanest worked example of the primitives of intelligence: search, learning from experience, and self-play.
items.summary_en: Focus: AlphaGo is still the cleanest worked example of the primitives of intelligence: search, learning from experience, and self-play.

items.title: [AINews] Loopcraft: The Art of Stacking Loops
items.summary_zh: 重点：a quiet day lets us highlight a great concept from Peter Steinberger, Boris Cherny, and Andrej Karpathy
items.summary_en: Focus: a quiet day lets us highlight a great concept from Peter Steinberger, Boris Cherny, and Andrej Karpathy

items.title: David Reich – Why the Bronze Age was an inflection point in human evolution
items.summary_zh: 重点："Instead of being quiescent, natural selection is everywhere."
items.summary_en: Focus: "Instead of being quiescent, natural selection is everywhere."

items.title: How to Stop Shipping Low-Quality RL Environments (with Examples)
items.summary_zh: 重点：Your broken harness is actively making the model worse. Here's what I keep seeing after years of eyeballing trajectories, and what you need to fix.
items.summary_en: Focus: Your broken harness is actively making the model worse. Here's what I keep seeing after years of eyeballing trajectories, and what you need to fix.

items.title: Claude Fable 5 access suspended on AI Gateway
items.summary_zh: 重点：In compliance with the US Government's directive , access to Claude Fable 5 is now suspended on AI Gateway for all users. We do not know if or when access to the model will be restored. You can still access and use other Anthropic models through AI Gateway.
items.summary_en: Focus: In compliance with the US Government's directive , access to Claude Fable 5 is now suspended on AI Gateway for all users. We do not know if or when access to the model will be restored. You can still access and use other Anthropic models through AI Gateway.

items.title: Program Claude Code, Codex, Pi and other agent harnesses with AI SDK
items.summary_zh: 重点：AI SDK 7 introduces HarnessAgent , a single API for running established agent harnesses, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi. AI SDK has always let you switch models without rewriting your agent. Now you can switch the harness the same way. Write the agent
items.summary_en: Focus: AI SDK 7 introduces HarnessAgent , a single API for running established agent harnesses, including Claude Code, Codex, and Pi. AI SDK has always let you switch models without rewriting your agent. Now you can switch the harness the same way. Write the agent once. Use the best harness availabl
